---
pagetitle: "Depth First"
listing:
  id: post-index
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: custom
  template: _post-row.ejs
page-layout: full
title-block: none
---

```{=html}
<div class="df-header">
  <a href="/" class="df-sidebar">
    <span class="df-vol-label">Est. 2026 &middot; Ongoing</span>
    <span class="df-wordmark">DEPTH FIRST</span>
  </a>
  <div class="df-hero">
    <div class="df-hero-top">
      <div class="df-hero-label">Currently exploring</div>
      <h1 class="df-hero-title">
        <span>Comics.</span>
        <span>Math.</span>
        <span>Agency.</span>
      </h1>
      <p class="df-hero-desc">A record of going extremely deep on many unrelated things.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="df-hero-bottom">
      <span class="df-hero-author">Adam Henderson &middot; 2026</span>
      <nav class="df-hero-nav">
        <a href="about.html">About</a>
        <a href="publications.html">Publications</a>
      </nav>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {#post-index}
:::

```{=html}
<div class="df-cat-bar">
  <div class="df-cat-cell">
    Culture
    <span class="df-cat-sub">Comics, Music, TV, Games, MTG</span>
  </div>
  <div class="df-cat-cell">
    Ideas
    <span class="df-cat-sub">Math, Physics, Philosophy, Consciousness</span>
  </div>
  <div class="df-cat-cell">
    Tech
    <span class="df-cat-sub">Software, ML, Agentic Dev</span>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="df-footnote">
  <span>12 entries &middot; depth first</span>
  <span>new entries when something earns one</span>
</div>
```
